title: Darrius Modpack 4: Reborn
description: The fourth and (hopefully) final revision of Darrius Modpack: Create + Origins + Terralith SMP modpack
body:
![Darrius: Reborn - Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5332aecfcf08bc313abd8028b93d208670b18c55_0.webp)
Introducing the fourth and (hopefully) final version of Darrius Modpack — an SMP modpack featuring Create, Origins, and Terralith (with CTOV). This edition is optimized for performance, removing several mods to enhance speed while maintaining a similar gameplay experience. Built on Simply Optimized, it includes several quality-of-life mods like Simple Voice Chat, Jade, a minimap, and JEI. For a more immersive combat experience, Better Combat is included (mainly for fighting mobs, of course).

## Future Plans
1. Resource packs enabled by default
1. Add Fresh Animations?!
1. More mods that may prove helpful in an SMP
1. Essential or another mod for multiplayer w/o a server
1. Server-specific modpack

## Usage
To use this modpack as the client, use a prefered modpack client, including Modrinth's very own client. To use this modpack on a server, I would suggest making some adjustments as this modpack has quite a few client-side mods and lacks some server-type mods.
